// AutoLoot: Reading order: every // key is documentation; real settings follow in the same order. DebugLogging through LockpickLootBankPercent.
// DebugLogging: When true, logs PostGenerateTreasure entry and early-return reasons to Ace_Log (verbose; disable after debugging).
// DepositLootedCurrencyToBank: When true, looted pyreal stacks and trade notes are credited to banked pyreals (PropertyInt64) instead of inventory.
// BankCashProperty: Must match LeyLineLedger Settings.CashProperty when using that mod (default 39999).
// LootProfilePath: Folder for .utl loot profiles. Default empty: PatchClass sets Path.Combine(ModPath, "LootProfiles"). Override to any server path; /autoloot creates the folder if missing.
// DefaultActiveProfiles: Archived. .utl profiles are no longer used; all banking is handled by C# code (currencies, trophies, keys, lockpicks, salvage). Keep empty.
// DefaultProfile: Legacy: single default filename when DefaultActiveProfiles is empty. Leave empty.
// NoDuplicateNames: Name substrings (case-insensitive): if an item matches and the player already has same WCID in inventory, skip loot.
// WindblownCollectorTrophyPass1WeenieCl: Windblown collector trophy WCIDs (850300-850361 + 800000-800002): Pass 1 pulls these from corpse/chest into the pack only when /autoloot trophies is ON.
// OtherPhysicalPass1WeenieClassIds: Other physical quest items: Pass 1 pulls these into the pack regardless of /autoloot trophies (letters, olthoi pincers, etc.).
// KeysUnlockThreshold: DEPRECATED — Key auto-banking is now unconditional for all players.
// LockpickUnlockThreshold: Number of objects unlocked with lockpicks required to unlock lockpick corpse-loot banking.
// SalvageUnlockThreshold: DEPRECATED — AutoSalvage is now available to all players from the start.
// KeyBankProperties: WCID to PropertyInt64 mapping for key banking (must match LeyLineLedger Settings.Items).
// LockpickBankProperty: PropertyInt64 for banked lockpick durability (must match LeyLineLedger / BetterSupportSkills).
// LockpickLootBankPercent: Fraction of lockpick charges banked when looted from corpses/chests. Must match LeyLineLedger LockpickLootBankRatio (0.50 = 50%).
// EnableChestAutoLoot: When true, opening a non-house chest runs profile autoloot immediately; closing runs banking passes so leftovers credit LLL before ACE resets the chest.
// EnableLootStackConsolidation: When true (default), duplicate same-WCID items in a corpse are merged into a single stack after loot generation.
// EnableDelayedSalvageSweep: When true, on corpse/chest close runs BetterSupportSkills material salvage on leftovers.
// EnableLevel8CompsConversion: When true, level 8 spellcrafting components are auto-converted to pyreal value.
// DefaultAutolootSalvageBundleApplied: When true: first login runs full /autoloot on + AutoSalvage; existing prefs with AutolootSalvageDefaultsApplied=false get the same once.
